name: Mainland Travel Permit for Hong Kong and Macao Residents (Home Return Permit)
fastest_entry: Become a qualified Hong Kong or Macau resident of Chinese nationality, then obtain the permit from Mainland authorities.
physical_presence: None specified for the permit itself.
confidence: high: based on NIA service guide, but the permit is an entry/status document rather than a self-standing settlement right.

name: Mainland-to-Hong Kong One-way Permit settlement scheme
fastest_entry: Qualify through family reunion class under NIA rules, then obtain a Mainland-issued one-way permit.
physical_presence: Spouse-class approval requires 3+ yrs separation; PR generally after 7 yrs ordinary residence unless right of abode by descent applies.
confidence: high: current NIA notices and HK Immigration Department materials align on quota and categories.
sources: NIA announcement 2026-06-30 on settlement approval classes
HK Immigration Dept one-way permit FAQs

name: Mainland-to-Macau settlement permit scheme
fastest_entry: Qualify through family reunion class under NIA rules, then obtain Mainland approval to settle in Macau.
physical_presence: Spouse-class approval requires 3+ yrs separation; PR generally after 7 yrs ordinary residence.
confidence: high: NIA notice plus Macau Basic Law/implementation opinions.
sources: Macau Basic Law Art. 22/24 + NPC implementation opinion

name: Hong Kong permanent residency seven-year track
fastest_entry: Enter under a lawful status; 7 years ordinary residence.
physical_presence: 7 years of ordinary residence.
confidence: high: grounded in Basic Law Article 24.

name: Macau permanent residency seven-year track
fastest_entry: Enter under an approved residence route; 7 years ordinary residence.
physical_presence: 7 years of ordinary residence, category-specific interpretation.
confidence: high: Macau Basic Law and official implementation opinion.

name: Taiwan special residence and settlement regime for Hong Kong and Macau residents
fastest_entry: Apply under the Hong Kong/Macao legal regime for residence first, then settlement after qualifying stay and review.
physical_presence: Residence first; settlement after qualifying stay under Taiwan permit rules.
confidence: medium: primary sources confirm the distinct legal regime, but post-2020 practice shifted by security-review administration.
sources: Hong Kong and Macao Affairs Act

name: Taiwan Mainland-spouse residence and settlement track
fastest_entry: Family-based application as spouse of a Taiwan national under the Mainland-spouse permit rules.
physical_presence: Residence, long-term residence, then settlement stages.
confidence: medium: special spouse regime is real in primary law, but latest operational details are fragmented.

name: France-Morocco Accord on Stay and Employment
fastest_entry: Qualifying work-based admission under the bilateral accord's stay-and-employment rules.
physical_presence: Residence-card progression follows the accord and French domestic law.
last_change: Still applied by French courts in 2023
confidence: high: primary treaty text and recent French court use confirm continued force.

name: France-Tunisia Accord on Stay and Work
fastest_entry: Qualifying work or family admission under the Tunisia-specific treaty framework.
physical_presence: Residence progression per treaty plus French law where silent.
confidence: high: treaty publication, amendments, and recent court citation all verified.

name: France-Senegal circulation, establishment, and migration-management package
fastest_entry: Use the circulation/stay convention and the 2006/2008 derogatory work/stay channels.
physical_presence: Varies by permit category; supports residence progression.
confidence: high: CESEDA annex and French court decisions confirm continuing applicability.

name: France-Gabon circulation, establishment, and migration-management package
fastest_entry: Qualify under the circulation/stay convention and treaty-based work or establishment route.
physical_presence: Residence progression under bilateral conventions and French law.
confidence: high: unusually well documented in treaty publication and case law.

name: France-Cameroon circulation, stay, and migration-management package
fastest_entry: Treaty-based admission on circulation/stay and specific work derogations.
physical_presence: Dependent on permit path under the 1994 convention and later accord.
confidence: medium: treaty force is clear, but the practical reach of the 2009 accord is narrower.
sources: French court citation of the 2009 accord

name: France-Benin migration-management and codeveloppement accord
fastest_entry: Nationality-specific legal migration channels, mostly work/study/professional categories.
physical_presence: Category-dependent; not a direct PR or citizenship route.
confidence: medium: derogation from CESEDA confirmed, but narrower than the Maghreb/Senegal/Gabon packages.

name: France-Mali circulation and establishment package
fastest_entry: Use the surviving circulation/stay and establishment conventions where administratively recognized.
physical_presence: Residence progression under French permit rules once admitted.
last_change: No recent amendment; political relations raise implementation risk
confidence: medium: CESEDA annex confirms formal survival, but current administrative practice is politically exposed.

name: CEMAC free movement of persons with biometric CEMAC passport
fastest_entry: Hold a valid biometric CEMAC passport and travel intra-CEMAC.
physical_presence: None for entry; residence/establishment less clearly implemented than travel.
last_change: CEMAC reported significant but incomplete progress in 2025
confidence: medium: bloc decisions clear, real-world implementation uneven.

name: ECCAS free movement and right of establishment framework
fastest_entry: No single operational supranational route verified.
physical_presence: Not standardized region-wide.
confidence: medium: treaty language strong, weak evidence of self-executing residence right.

name: Russia-Tajikistan Treaty on the Regulation of Dual Citizenship Questions
fastest_entry: Acquire the other state's citizenship under domestic law while retaining original citizenship under the treaty.
physical_presence: Depends on domestic naturalization law.
last_change: No verified termination; still cited as the live Russia dual-citizenship exception
confidence: high: treaty and ratification sources are explicit.

name: Russia-Uzbekistan organized recruitment lane for temporary labor migration
fastest_entry: State-managed organized recruitment under the 2017 bilateral agreement.
physical_presence: Temporary labor stay only.
confidence: high: formal publication verified.

name: Russia-Tajikistan organized recruitment lane for temporary labor migration
fastest_entry: State-managed organized recruitment under the 2019 bilateral agreement.
physical_presence: Temporary labor stay only.
confidence: high: official publication verified.

name: Kazakhstan Kandas ethnic-return and simplified citizenship regime
fastest_entry: Obtain kandas status as an ethnic Kazakh; then permanent residence and simplified citizenship REGARDLESS of length of residence.
physical_presence: Simplified citizenship for kandas permanently residing in Kazakhstan, regardless of prior residence duration.
last_change: 2026-02-13 digital pilot for PR and kandas-status services
confidence: high: based on current Kazakhstan e-government guidance.
sources: eGov.kz simplified citizenship guidance for kandas

name: Andorra-Spain-France convention on entry, movement, stay and establishment
fastest_entry: Use the nationality-specific convention and Andorran residence/work procedures.
physical_presence: Residence/work authorizations renew on convention basis; naturalization stays ordinary (20 yrs).
last_change: Still cited in 2023-2026 Andorran e-government procedures
confidence: high: current government procedure pages expressly cite the convention.

name: Andorra-Portugal convention on entry, movement, stay and establishment
fastest_entry: Use the nationality-specific convention and ordinary Andorran residence/work procedures.
physical_presence: Residence/work authorizations renew on the convention basis.
confidence: high: current government procedure pages expressly cite the convention.

name: Liechtenstein-Switzerland framework on visas, entry and stay
fastest_entry: Use the 2008 bilateral framework plus domestic immigration procedures.
physical_presence: Switzerland recognizes a 5-yr settlement effect for Liechtenstein nationals; Liechtenstein uses quota-limited structures for Swiss nationals.
confidence: medium: framework verified, but practical edge beyond EEA/Swiss baseline is asymmetric.

name: Argentina-Spain nationality convention
fastest_entry: Qualify for the other country's citizenship under domestic law and preserve bilateral double-nationality treatment under the convention.
physical_presence: Depends on Spanish or Argentine citizenship law.
last_change: 2001 protocol remains attached to the 1969 convention
confidence: high: BOE confirms the convention and protocol remain in force.

name: Argentina-Italy citizenship agreement
fastest_entry: Acquire the other citizenship under domestic law and rely on the bilateral citizenship agreement where applicable.
physical_presence: Depends on domestic nationality law.
last_change: Italy's 1992 general dual-citizenship law reduced its uniqueness but did not erase relevance
confidence: medium: treaty existence clear, but modern marginal effect narrower than often claimed.
